Senate Decisions for the Spring Semester 2022-23

In line with the decisions taken by the Council of Higher Education due to the earthquake that occurred on February 6, 2023 and affected at least 10 provinces, the following decisions have been taken by our Senate for the 2022-23 Spring semester:

1. Our spring semester courses will resume online on Monday, February 27, 2023. The theoretical parts of the courses and the assessments of these parts will be administered via distance education.

2. The dates and method for the practical parts of the courses, midterm and final exams will be determined and announced in line with the decisions of the Council of Higher Education.

3. In other topics, the methods in the “Questions and Answers Regarding the 2022-2023 Spring Semester Education and Training in Our Higher Education Institutions” announced by the Council of Higher Education will be taken as basis.
